title: Pure context selection engine
acceptance_criteria: selectContext pure function: Graph -> CommunityMap -> Analysis -> Text -> ContextBudget -> SelectedContext
Strategy 1: Community-aware selection (find matching node -> get community -> include bridge nodes)
Strategy 2: Relevance-weighted BFS (score nodes by matchScore + confidenceScore + community + bridge/god status)
Strategy 3: Path-based selection for cross-module queries (shortest_path + neighbors + communities)
classifyComplexity function: Text -> QueryComplexity (simple heuristic based on query terms and match count)
computeBudget: QueryComplexity -> Int -> ContextBudget (dynamic ratio per complexity level)
Reuse existing findBestNode, matchScore, confidenceScore where possible
Explicit exports, type signatures on all top-level definitions
